category_sources: Official homepage https://cmph.sourceforge.net/ describes CMPH as a minimal perfect hash C library and utility.
source_facts.description says it is a C minimal perfect hashing library.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is CMPH - C Minimal Perfect Hashing Library.
SourceForge project page uses project name cmph.
docs_sources: Official homepage includes usage, API-oriented examples, FAQ link, downloads, and license; no separate official docs site found.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page exposes a Git section for cmph.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes the library and cmph utility application.
source_facts.description identifies C minimal perfect hashing library.
